idea-plugin.name: AI Worktree Reviewer
idea-plugin.description:
AI Worktree Reviewer

Review changes across multiple Git worktrees without leaving your editor — built for the era of AI coding agents that work several branches in parallel.

  • Active Worktrees tool window that lists every worktree with +/- change badges
  • Browse a worktree's uncommitted changes and open side-by-side HEAD vs working-tree diffs
  • Review every changed file in a single diff tab
  • Open a worktree as a project, or remove it — all from one panel
  • Toggle the panel with Alt+Shift+W

All git calls run on a background thread, so the IDE UI never freezes.

action.description: Toggles the Git Worktrees sidebar panel
